Firewall (2006)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $48,751,189Details
International Box Office $34,000,000
Worldwide Box Office $82,751,189
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $21,405,695
Total $21,405,695
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$13,635,463 (28.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.58 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$50,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,840 opening theaters/2,840 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $89,017,443

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 10th, 2006 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
Video Release: June 6th, 2006 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some intense sequences of violence, and for some language
Running Time: 105 minutes
Plot point: Crime, Heist, Kidnap, No Honor Among Thieves, Revenge
Subgenre: Crime Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Village Roadshow Productions, Beacon Pictures, Jon Shestack, Thunder Road Film, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
